notes: The UI journey itself reached a real eight-round Match End in room 3F7724. All four tabs visibly agreed on winner 舞者甲 and final scores P1=10 P2=6 P3=9 P4=7.
This remains exploratory Adapter discovery with productVerdict not_evaluated. Referee-selected exploratory actions are mapping evidence, not natural-user certification evidence.

The strict audit rejects early public evidence records whose contentClass was recorded as public instead of public_ui and the exploratory player Observations that reference those records. Evidence was not edited or backfilled after the fact.
P2 finding 1: a rejected player-count reduction leaves the host select temporarily showing the rejected value while peer tabs retain the accepted value.
P2 finding 2: the shared-browser recent-room entry exposes every public identity previously used by that browser, increasing accidental tab-identity remapping risk without exposing private cards.

Formal forward execution was not started because the available runtime cannot provide four simultaneous persistent fork_turns none player agents with tools disabled; the Catalog therefore remains planned.
